property.name: mapreduce.framework.name
property.description: The runtime framework for executing MapReduce jobs. Set to yarn to run on YARN resource manager.

property.name: mapreduce.map.memory.mb
property.description: The resource limit (in MB) for each Mapper container.

property.name: mapreduce.reduce.memory.mb
property.description: The resource limit (in MB) for each Reducer container.

property.name: mapreduce.map.java.opts
property.description: JVM heap options for Mappers (typically 80% of map.memory.mb).

property.name: mapreduce.reduce.java.opts
property.description: JVM heap options for Reducers (typically 80% of reduce.memory.mb).

property.name: mapreduce.task.io.sort.mb
property.description: The size of the serialization buffer (in MB) used while sorting mapper outputs.

property.name: mapreduce.task.io.sort.factor
property.description: The limit of stream connections used during merge sort passes (default 10, tuned to 100 for production).

property.name: mapreduce.map.sort.spill.percent
property.description: The threshold limit of mapreduce.task.io.sort.mb at which spilling begins.

property.name: mapreduce.reduce.shuffle.parallelcopies
property.description: Number of parallel fetchers spawned by reducers during shuffle stage.

property.name: mapreduce.reduce.shuffle.input.buffer.percent
property.description: Percentage of reducer heap allocated for caching fetched map outputs during shuffle.

property.name: mapreduce.reduce.shuffle.merge.percent
property.description: Usage threshold of the map output buffer at which an active merge sort to disk starts.

property.name: mapreduce.map.speculative
property.description: Run speculative copies of mappers that execute slower than averages.

property.name: mapreduce.reduce.speculative
property.description: Run speculative copies of reducers that execute slower than averages.

property.name: mapreduce.jobhistory.address
property.description: The IPC server address of the Job History Server (JHS).

property.name: mapreduce.jobhistory.webapp.address
property.description: The Web UI address of the Job History Server (JHS).
